Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the compartment that contains the Object Storage link.
  • availability_domain - (Required) The availability domain that the Lustre file system is in.
  • lustre_file_system_id - (Required) The OCID of the associated Lustre file system.
  • file_system_path - (Required) The path in the Lustre file system used for this Object Storage link.
  • object_storage_prefix - (Required) The Object Storage namespace and bucket path used for imports or exports.
  • is_overwrite - (Required) (Updatable) Whether imports or exports overwrite existing files.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the Object Storage link.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
